title: cyperus atriceps
intro: Cyperus atriceps, also known as black sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus atriceps include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The herbal preparations of Cyperus atriceps typically involve drying the roots and using them in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
